def get_user_name(config):
    local_config = dict(config)
    return local_config["user"]["name"]


def get_setting(settings):
    copy = settings.copy()
    return copy["database"]["host"]


def lookup_value(data, key):
    snapshot = dict(data)
    return snapshot[key]["nested"]["value"]


def extract_headers(request):
    headers_copy = dict(request.headers)
    return headers_copy["Authorization"]


def read_config(config):
    cfg = dict(config)
    host = cfg["host"]
    port = cfg["port"]
    return f"{host}:{port}"
